message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #B0E0E6
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 2
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment top
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantMinWidth 100
skinparam participantMaxWidth 300
skinparam participantMinHeight 50
skinparam participantMaxHeight 100
skinparam participantMinX 0
skinparam participantMaxX 1000
skinparam participantMinY 0
skinparam participantMaxY 1000
skinparam participantMinZ 0
skinparam participantMaxZ 1000
skinparam participantMinOpacity 0
skinparam participantMaxOpacity 1
skinparam participantMinTransparency 0
skinparam participantMaxTransparency 1
skinparam participantMinSaturation 0
skinparam participantMaxSaturation 1
skinparam participantMinHue 0
skinparam participantMaxHue 360
skinparam participantMinLightness 0
skinparam participantMaxLightness 1
skinparam participantMinValue 0
skinparam participantMaxValue 1
skinparam participantMinAlpha 0
skinparam participantMaxAlpha 1
skinparam participantMinBeta 0
skinparam participantMaxBeta 1
skinparam participantMinGamma 0
skinparam participantMaxGamma 1
skinparam participantMinDelta 0
skinparam participantMaxDelta 1
skinparam participantMinEpsilon 0
skinparam participantMaxEpsilon 1
skinparam participantMinZeta 0
skinparam participantMaxZeta 1
skinparam participantMinEta 0
skinparam participantMaxEta 1
skinparam participantMinTheta 0
skinparam participantMaxTheta 1
skinparam participantMinIota 0
skinparam participantMaxIota 1
skinparam participantMinKappa 0
skinparam participantMaxKappa 1
skinparam participantMinLambda 0
skinparam participantMaxLambda 1
skinparam participantMinMu 0
skinparam participantMaxMu 1
skinparam participantMinNu 0
skinparam participantMaxNu 1
skinparam participantMinXi 0
skinparam participantMaxXi 1
skinparam participantMinOmicron 0
skinparam participantMaxOmicron 1
skinparam participantMinPi 0
skinparam participantMaxPi 1
skinparam participantMinRho 0
skinparam participantMaxRho 1
skinparam participantMinSigma 0
skinparam participantMaxSigma 1
skinparam participantMinTau 0
skinparam participantMaxTau 1
skinparam participantMinUpsilon 0
skinparam participantMaxUpsilon 1
skinparam participantMinPhi 0
skinparam participantMaxPhi 1
skinparam participantMinChi 0
skinparam participantMaxChi 1
skinparam participantMinPsi 0
skinparam participantMaxPsi 1
skinparam participantMinOmega 0
skinparam participantMaxOmega 1

participant "snap" as snap
participant "OnFlingListener" as onfling
participant "OnScrollListener" as onscroll
participant "SnapHelper" as snaphelper
participant "LinearSmoothScroller" as linearsmoothscroller

activate snap
onfling ->> onfling: onFling
onfling ->> snaphelper: snapFromFling
snaphelper ->> snap: findTargetSnapPosition
snaphelper ->> linearsmoothscroller: createSnapScroller
linearsmoothscroller --> snaphelper: onTargetFound
snaphelper ->> snap: calculateDistanceToFinalSnap
onscroll ->> onscroll: onScrollStateChanged
onscroll ->> snaphelper: snapToTargetExistingView
snaphelper ->> snap: findSnapView
snaphelper ->> snap: calculateDistanceToFinalSnap
deactivate snap

@enduml
